$comment: Sample photoshop-mcp batch recipe (transport-layer.md §8). Each step's name/params match the individual photoshop_* MCP tools exactly. The engine wraps every file with open -> steps -> export -> close(no-save); do NOT add open/save/close steps yourself. These steps are dimension-independent so the recipe runs on any input. Run headless with: photoshop-mcp batch examples/batch-recipe.example.json  (Photoshop GUI must be running).
